description: A new version of the application has passed all tests and is ready to be deployed to production.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the build version in the CI/CD pipeline is the correct one and has a 'green' status.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the correct build is approved for deployment.

nodes.task_description: Initiate a canary deployment, releasing the new version to 5% of users.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully starts the canary release process.

nodes.task_description: Monitor error rates and performance metrics for the canary group for 30 minutes.

expected_outcome.value: Agent monitors dashboards and confirms no increase in errors.

nodes.task_description: Since the canary release is stable, proceed with a full rollout to all users.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully promotes the release to 100% of traffic.
